caption: A video game depiction of an American football game features a stadium setting with a green field, white yard lines, and a crowd in the background. Players from two teams, one in white uniforms and one in dark uniforms, are lined up at the scrimmage line. A referee in a black-and-white striped shirt stands nearby. The top of the screen displays a game interface with text including "1st & 10", a team logo with "14", "EXO 7", "3rd", "1:58", "27", and a timer showing ":30" or ":29". A small text banner reads "Q. SMITH R14 36 YDS 1 TD 1 INT". In the bottom left of each frame, a picture-in-picture window shows a man with blonde hair wearing a black shirt, gesturing with his hands. Across the sequence, the players remain largely stationary in their positions, while the timer counts down from ":30" to ":29".
